Argument.Name: path
Argument.Description: The path to a directory containing a .sln file, a specific .sln file, or a specific .csproj file. Defaults to the current working directory

Option.Description: The path to the configuration file. Defaults to the config.json in the current working directory.
Force restoring the NuGet dependencies, even if the lockfile is up-to-date
Allow enabling or disabling an interactive mode of "dotnet restore". Defaults to true
